SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Validation<E,T>

Type Parameters:
E - The type of errors.
T - The type of the valid value.
All Superinterfaces:
Collection<T>, Higher<Collection.µ,T>, Iterable<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Validation.Invalid, Validation.Valid
public interface Validation<E,T> extends Collection<T>
A data type that represents either a success (Valid) or an accumulation of errors (Invalid). Unlike Either, Validation does not short-circuit on the first error; it accumulates them using a Semigroup.

    • liftA2

      default <R, S> Validation<E,S> liftA2(BiFunction<T,R,S> fn, Validation<E,R> other, Semigroup<E> semigroup)
      Combines this validation with another. If both are invalid, their errors are combined using the provided Semigroup.

    • sequence

      static <E, T> Validation<E,Collection<T>> sequence(Collection<Validation<E,T>> vs, Semigroup<E> semigroup)
      Transforms a collection of validations into a single validation that accumulates errors.
